fabricQueryR 0.2.1.9000

Package index

All functions

fabric_item()
Discover one Microsoft Fabric item
fabric_items()
Discover Microsoft Fabric items
fabric_livy_query()
Run a Livy API query (Spark code) in Microsoft Fabric
fabric_onelake_read_delta_table()
Read a Microsoft Fabric/OneLake Delta table (ADLS Gen2)
fabric_pbi_dax_query()
Query a Microsoft Fabric/Power Bi semantic model with DAX
fabric_sql_connect()
Connect to a Microsoft Fabric SQL target
fabric_sql_connection_info()
Parse a Microsoft Fabric SQL target
fabric_sql_query()
Run a parameterized query against Microsoft Fabric SQL
fabric_lakehouses() fabric_warehouses() fabric_sql_databases() fabric_semantic_models() fabric_eventhouses() fabric_kql_databases() fabric_notebooks() fabric_graphql_apis()
Typed Microsoft Fabric item discovery
fabric_workspaces()
Discover Microsoft Fabric workspaces
